title: Runes & Elementals
description: Adds runes that can be applied to swords, axes, bows and crossbows
body:
![Main Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc76330a13fde45df42849657a2044849dc42e44_0.webp)

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/929af486baab85ce7fa41ad1c1dde2dfdca20bac_0.webp)

>  Use ancient runes and elemental powers to change the world around you! Summon strong creatures, defend yourself, or control nature. Find hidden ruins to learn secrets, craft runes with special abilities, and work with the elements to grow stronger. Will you use this magic to help the world or take control?
---

Runes & Elementals Mod - Open Source Available

Please note that Runes & Elementals is no longer actively under development. However, the mod’s source code and all necessary resources are now available for you to explore, modify, and continue working with. You can access everything you need on GitHub:

🔗 [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/jenki258/Runes-Elementals-Code)

Feel free to fork, edit, or fix bugs to make it your own! Just remember to respect the original licensing terms. Enjoy, and happy modding!

---
![summary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/935b42744e2e65114f4be2d2ac7e185836a8ac8b_0.webp)

Adds 5 new runes:

- Air rune
- Fire Rune
- Earth Rune
- Ice Rune
- Lightning Rune

> Each of them having their own abilities and different styles.
